sizing_rule.note: Use maximum computationally feasible scenarios for position sizing via scenario analysis. Calculate multipliers using cumulative probability formula: (outcome / initial_capital) + 1. Avoid consolidating scenarios into fewer categories to preserve critical distribution information. Optimal f calculation requires full scenario distribution, not reduced categories.

source_rule_text: Use as many scenarios as computationally manageable to calculate position sizing, as broadening scenarios into fewer categories (e.g., reducing to only three) eliminates critical information and severely hampers effectiveness.
